name: us-all/dbt-mcp-server
description: dbt MCP server with 22 read-only tools across `manifest.json` / `run_results.json` / `sources.json` / `catalog.json` (model/test/source introspection, run-history analysis, slow models, per-column test coverage, lineage walks) plus 5 DQ result-table tools (BigQuery + Postgres lazy peer imports). 4 triage Prompts and 4 aggregations.
